# af config init creates the user config under $HOME/.config/af/config.toml
# and refuses to overwrite it on a second invocation.

env HOME=$WORK/home
exec af config init
stdout 'config\.toml'

exists $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml
grep 'schema_version = 1' $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml

! exec af config init
stderr 'already exists'
